err_info: qemu-system-x86_64: -device efa_pci: table & pba overlap, or they don't fit in BARs, or don't align
modified_location: modify msix_init call to use BAR 0 with appropriate offsets
modify_details: The MSI-X initialization was causing a collision because it was using NULL regions and zero offsets. Updated it to use BAR 0 with safe offsets.
